name: Bahia Metals Corp.
description: Bahia Metals Corp. is a Canadian-listed junior mineral exploration company focused on advancing the Mangueiros nickel sulphide-copper-cobalt project located in the state of Bahia, northeast Brazil. The company completed its IPO on the Canadian Securities Exchange in February 2026, raising $5.75 million to fund exploration of the large-scale Mangueiros sulphide system, which features shallow mineralization with nickel, copper, and cobalt credits. Bahia Metals is at the early exploration stage with no current mineral production.
